overall.description: A first-person perspective video game sequence showing a marina waterfront in a sunny urban environment resembling Los Santos from GTA V. The scene begins stationary watching a small boat cross the water, then transitions to walking along wooden docks and a waterfront promenade lined with modern high-rise buildings and palm trees, ending as the camera approaches pedestrians near a city street.

events.description: small red and white motorboat moves across the water from right to left
motorboat exits the frame to the left, leaving empty water

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on the wooden dock watching the boat cross the marina

notable_agents.action: small red and white motorboat moving across the marina from right to left

entered.detail: wooden planks of the dock visible in the foreground
calm blue water of the marina reflecting the sky
low modern building with curved roof and horizontal lines
dense cluster of palm trees on a small peninsula across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny marina with the camera stationary on a wooden dock. A small motorboat crosses the water from right to left while modern architecture and palm trees frame the background across the calm blue water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway with boat slips

events.description: camera begins moving forward along the dock walkway
view opens to reveal multiple dock slips and the twin residential towers

agents.ego_description: walking forward along the wooden dock and turning right to survey the marina

entered.detail: two tall curved modern residential towers with glass and concrete facades
multiple wooden dock platforms extending into the water with boats moored
white posts marking the edges of the dock walkways
small white speedboat tied to the dock on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera begins moving along the wooden dock, turning right to reveal a wider view of the marina. Modern twin residential towers rise in the distance on the right while dock slips with moored boats line the water's edge.

events.description: child in red clothing becomes visible standing on the dock to the right
passing by the child and continuing along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past moored boats and palm trees

notable_agents.action: child in red jacket standing on the dock looking at the water
adult figure standing near the child on the dock

entered.detail: paved walkway along the marina with metal railings
metal chain link fence separating the path from the water
row of tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
low-rise residential buildings with balconies behind the palm trees
real estate sign with red text reading 'For Sale'

segments.scene_description: Walking along the paved waterfront promenade, the camera passes a chain-link fence on the left and palm trees on the right. The twin towers now dominate the left side of the frame while a child in red stands on a dock to the right. The path continues past residential buildings and a For Sale sign.

events.description: approaching street level with parked cars and urban infrastructure
two pedestrians come into view standing and conversing on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching pedestrians and the city street

notable_agents.action: man and woman standing on the sidewalk engaged in conversation
man walking along the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: distant downtown skyscrapers visible in the background
several cars parked along the street to the right
wooden bench on the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more urban setting as the camera approaches a city street. The downtown skyline is visible in the distance, cars are parked along the curb, and pedestrians stand conversing on the sidewalk. The marina water is now behind as the path becomes a city sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a serene marina waterfront into a bustling urban city street. It begins stationary on a wooden dock, watching a small motorboat glide across calm blue water framed by palm trees and modern architecture. As the camera starts moving, it turns right to reveal a wider vista of the marina, passing moored boats and residential towers that rise in the distance. The scene then shifts onto a paved promenade, moving past a chain-link fence and a child in red while the twin towers dominate the skyline. Finally, the environment transitions from the waterfront to a city sidewalk, moving past parked cars toward a group of conversing pedestrians with the downtown skyline visible ahead.
